title: March 21
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}
'''March 21''' is the 80th day of the year (81st in leap years). There are 285 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1931|1931]] – [[Al Williamson]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Taborah Johnson]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Gary Oldman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Mark Waid]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Greg Ellis]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Rachael MacFarlane]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 56|''Star Wars Weekly'' 56]] published.
*[[1983]] – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|The Empire Strikes Back:]]'' "[[Way of the Jedi (episode)|Way of the Jedi]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 40|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 40]] published.
*[[1988]] – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 3|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 3]] is published in the Spring.
*[[1989]] – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 7|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 7]] is published in the Spring.
*[[1990]] – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 11|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 11]] is published in the Spring.
*[[1992]] – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 16|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 16]] is published in the Spring.
*[[1994]] – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 22|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 22]] is published in the Spring.
*[[1995]] – [[Dark Empire II 4|''Dark Empire II'' 4]] published.
*1995 – [[Star Wars Insider 25|''Star Wars Insider'' 25]] is published in the Spring.
*[[1996]] – [[Star Wars Insider 29|''Star Wars Insider'' 29]] is published in the Spring.
*[[1997]] – [[Star Wars Insider 33|''Star Wars Insider'' 33]] is published in the Spring.
*[[2001]] – [[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 3|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 3]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 48]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast: Official Perfect Guide]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 21]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2012]] – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm 2|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm'' 2]] published.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: The Other Sons of Tatooine]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Old Republic Vol. 2]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars Battlefront II]] progression system update released.
*2018 – [[Star Wars (2015) 45|''Star Wars'' (2015) 45]] published.
*2018 – [[Poe Dameron 25|''Poe Dameron'' 25]] published.
*2018 – ''[[Reflections]]'' released.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic: Chronicles of the Jedi]]'' published in the United States.
